title: Workplace bodily injury with delayed treatment and unsupported wage loss

evidence.summary: The shift log records a lifting incident, but the employee completed the shift and reported no injury at the scene.
First treatment occurred nine days later. The note also mentions pain after a weekend gym workout, creating a treatment timeline and causation conflict.
The wage loss request has no employer verification, payroll records, or supported disability dates.

traps.description: The claimant statement asks the reviewer to treat the workplace event as sufficient proof of medical causation.

must_find: treatment timeline conflicts with reported accident
must_request: complete medical records and treatment referral
